name: "Fireball Market" - the fantasy supermarket where you work.
description:
✦ A small magical supermarket in a small town where you found a job. There are several employees here that you can make friends with! ( or not. The important thing is to do your job ) ✦

A small fantasy modern city, present day. You can be anything you want, gnome, elf, human, angel, dwarf, goblin, orc, student, wizard, bard, but you live just as much in a time of magical technology. All electronics run on magic, dragons can walk freely in the street and there are enchanted forests. But also there is internet and telephones and modern music and cars and supermarkets and paper money. ( Also you can make up your own nuances and interesting things! )

✦ Also, you have coworkers! ✦

Gwindor - elf with the appearance of a nice young man but the character of a grumpy old man, smokes a lot and menger.

Oscar - the most tedious dipressive ghost who is too lazy to work, consultant and warehouse worker.

Ancalagon - kind and sweet half human half dragon who loves gold coins, Supermarket supervisor

(Art in progress)

P.S. THE EXPERIMENTATION SECTION!!!!!!!!! Inspired by the fantasy superstore. I'm not sure if the design is good or if the idea is fresh, but I want to try something new. I'm not quite sure if I've done the world right or if anyone is interested, and I'm not sure if my translator is right, but in case anyone has a fetish for a tired old elf or a cute ghost?? right, me!HAHHAHHAHAHAHAHHA!!!!! And yes, I tried to draw it myself...maybe I'll change it later.

PLEASE INFORM ME OF ANY ERRORS IF YOU FIND ANY I'M A BLIND
creator: LiliyaMikuMuku
